nodes.name: Red-breasted paradise kingfisher
nodes.summary: The red-breasted paradise kingfisher or fairy paradise kingfisher (Tanysiptera nympha) is a species of bird in the family Alcedinidae. It is found in New Guinea. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical mangrove forest. References

nodes.name: Tanysiptera
nodes.summary: Tanysiptera（Tanysiptera）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联9种鸟类，如Little paradise-kingfisher、Common paradise kingfisher、Kofiau paradise kingfisher等9种鸟类。
